description: CIP (Communications Intelligence Platform) scan-finding row — modeled on the CIP app's Run/Job/Finding/Channel types. One row = one channel finding from a comms-surface scan (web, email, social, IVR). Structural + format validation; scan execution + scoring live in the CIP application layer.

url.pattern_message: url must start with http:// or https://
url.fix: Serve the surface over https:// (or http://) - other schemes are not scannable.

plan.pattern_message: plan must be Starter, Standard, or Professional
plan.fix: Use one of: Starter, Standard, Professional.

channel.pattern_message: channel must be one of: audit, seo, funnel, email, deliverability, social, browser, inventory, ivr
channel.fix: Map to the closest CIP channel: audit, seo, funnel, email, deliverability, social, browser, inventory, ivr (e.g. telephony -> ivr).

severity.pattern_message: finding severity must be ok, warn, or issue
severity.fix: Map to the CIP scale: ok, warn or issue (e.g. critical -> issue).

status.pattern_message: job status must be pending, running, done, or failed
status.fix: Use one of: pending, running, done, failed.
